plugins.changelogTitle:
# Changelog

All notable changes to tekton-events-relay are documented here.
Format follows [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/).
Versioning follows [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

plugins.failComment: ❌ Release failed. See [CI logs](${ciUrl}) for details.
plugins.releaseBodyTemplate:
<%= nextRelease.notes %>

---

## 📦 Installation

### Docker Image

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/fabioluciano/tekton-events-relay:<%= nextRelease.version %>
```

### Helm Chart (OCI)

```bash
helm install tekton-events-relay \
  oci://ghcr.io/fabioluciano/charts/tekton-events-relay \
  --version <%= nextRelease.version %>
```

### Quick Start with GitHub

```bash
# Create secret with GitHub token
kubectl create secret generic github-default-token \
  --from-literal=token="$GITHUB_TOKEN" \
  --namespace tekton-events-relay

# Install chart with GitHub enabled
helm install tekton-events-relay \
  oci://ghcr.io/fabioluciano/charts/tekton-events-relay \
  --version <%= nextRelease.version %> \
  --namespace tekton-events-relay \
  --create-namespace \
  --set config.scm.github[0].enabled=true \
  --set config.scm.github[0].actions[0].enabled=true
```

See [Chart README](https://github.com/fabioluciano/tekton-events-relay/blob/main/charts/tekton-events-relay/README.md) for complete configuration.

plugins.prepareCmd: sed -i 's/^version: .*/version: ${nextRelease.version}/' charts/tekton-events-relay/Chart.yaml && sed -i 's/^appVersion: .*/appVersion: "${nextRelease.version}"/' charts/tekton-events-relay/Chart.yaml && sed -i 's|ghcr.io/fabioluciano/tekton-events-relay:[^ ]*|ghcr.io/fabioluciano/tekton-events-relay:${nextRelease.version}|g' charts/tekton-events-relay/Chart.yaml && helm-docs --chart-search-root=charts/tekton-events-relay && if [ -n '${nextRelease.channel}' ]; then rm -f CHANGELOG.md; fi
